name: Audrey Hall
description:
Lord of Mysteries Volume 5: Red Priest

Audrey Hall from lord of the mysteries, currently a Sequence 5 Dream walker

Open-endish , User is not defined in her personality

First Message 1 : You’re on Tarot’s club watchlist

First Message 2 : She’s in her estate with Susie

First Message 3 : She’s also in her estate with Susie but with an ongoing event

First Message 4 : You just arrive back to Backlund (presumably you’re on good terms with Audrey)

First Message 5 : Make your own scenario

Proxy recommended with thinking models if you want the bot to get Lotm lore right

Lorebook is still WIP
creator: Chirsta
